name: mean-well
tagline: Standard Power Supply - Your Reliable Power Partner
description: Mean Well is a leading standard power supply manufacturer headquartered in Taiwan, specializing in AC-DC power supplies, DC-DC converters, LED drivers, and medical power supplies. With over 40 years of experience, Mean Well delivers high-quality, cost-effective power solutions for industrial, medical, lighting, and renewable energy applications. As an authorized Mean Well distributor, BeiLuo provides comprehensive technical support and inventory for the complete product range.
longDescription: Founded in 1982 in Taiwan, Mean Well has grown to become one of the world's leading manufacturers of standard power supplies. The company operates multiple manufacturing facilities across Taiwan, China, and Europe, with a global distribution network serving customers in over 100 countries. Mean Well's product portfolio includes over 10,000 standard models ranging from 0.5W to 25,000W, covering AC-DC switching power supplies, DC-DC converters, LED drivers, battery chargers, and medical-grade power supplies. The company is renowned for its commitment to quality, holding ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 13485 certifications, with products meeting UL, CE, TUV, and medical safety standards. Mean Well's philosophy of 'Standard Power Supply' emphasizes providing reliable, cost-effective solutions that meet the diverse needs of industrial automation, LED lighting, medical equipment, transportation, and renewable energy applications. Their products are characterized by high efficiency, compact size, long lifespan, and comprehensive protection features. As an authorized Mean Well distributor, BeiLuo Electronics offers local inventory, technical support, and application engineering services to help customers select and implement the optimal power solution for their specific requirements.

seoTitle: Mean Well Power Supplies - Authorized Distributor | BeiLuo Electronics
seoDescription: Authorized Mean Well distributor. Stocking AC-DC power supplies, DC-DC converters, LED drivers, and medical power supplies. Technical support and fast delivery available.

faqs.question: Is BeiLuo an authorized Mean Well distributor?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo Electronics is an authorized distributor for Mean Well power supplies. We maintain direct relationships with Mean Well headquarters in Taiwan and have access to their complete product portfolio. As an authorized distributor, we provide genuine Mean Well products with full factory warranty, technical support, and application engineering services. Our inventory includes thousands of standard models with same-day shipping available for popular items. We also offer value-added services including custom configurations, technical documentation, and design-in support for complex applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify current stock availability and discuss your specific power supply requirements. We can provide datasheets, samples, and technical consultation.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Mean Well power supplies?
faqs.answer: Mean Well maintains excellent stock availability for their standard product lines. Popular models such as the LRS, RS, and HLG series are typically available from stock with 1-2 week delivery time. For high-volume orders or specialized configurations, lead times may range from 4-8 weeks depending on capacity and component availability. Mean Well's global manufacturing network helps minimize lead times even during periods of high demand. We recommend contacting our sales team for current lead time information and to discuss blanket order arrangements for production requirements. Emergency expedite options are available for critical situations.
faqs.decisionGuide: For urgent requirements, check our local inventory first. For production planning, consider placing forecast orders to ensure continuous supply.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Mean Well power supply for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right Mean Well power supply involves several key considerations. First, determine your input voltage requirements - Mean Well offers models for 85-264VAC universal input or specific regional voltages. Next, calculate your output power needs including 20-30% margin for peak demands and future expansion. Consider environmental conditions including operating temperature range, humidity, and required IP rating for outdoor applications. For LED applications, determine whether you need constant voltage or constant current output. Medical applications require IEC 60601-1 certified models with appropriate isolation levels. Industrial applications may need enhanced surge protection or conformal coating. Our FAE team can guide you through the selection process and provide application-specific recommendations.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our online selection tool or contact our FAE team with your input voltage, output power, and application details for personalized recommendations.

faqs.question: What makes Mean Well power supplies different from competitors?
faqs.answer: Mean Well differentiates itself through several key strengths. As a specialist in standard power supplies with over 40 years of experience, Mean Well offers the industry's broadest portfolio of standard models - over 10,000 products - reducing the need for expensive custom designs. Their products are known for exceptional reliability with MTBF ratings often exceeding 100,000 hours, backed by comprehensive 3-5 year warranties. Mean Well maintains strict quality control with 100% burn-in testing and operates certified ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 13485 manufacturing facilities. The company provides excellent value with competitive pricing without compromising quality. Their global service network ensures local support and fast delivery worldwide. Additionally, Mean Well demonstrates environmental responsibility with Energy Star certified products and RoHS compliance across the range.
faqs.decisionGuide: Compare Mean Well's specifications, warranty terms, and total cost of ownership with alternatives. Request samples for evaluation in your specific application.

faqs.question: What technical support does BeiLuo provide for Mean Well products?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo provides comprehensive technical support for Mean Well power supplies through our experienced FAE team. Services include product selection assistance based on your specific electrical and environmental requirements, application circuit review and recommendations, thermal analysis and heat sink selection guidance, EMC troubleshooting and filter design, MTBF and reliability calculations, and custom modification coordination with Mean Well factory. We offer reference designs for common applications and can facilitate factory direct support for complex technical questions. Our team has extensive experience with Mean Well products across industrial, medical, lighting, and transportation applications. Technical documentation including datasheets, application notes, and safety certificates are readily available through our online portal.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team early in your design phase for optimal product selection. Submit your requirements through our technical support form for detailed analysis.

faqs.question: Are Mean Well power supplies suitable for medical applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, Mean Well offers a comprehensive range of medical-grade power supplies certified to IEC 60601-1 standards. Their medical product line includes external adapters, open-frame, enclosed, and DIN rail mount configurations with power ratings from 5W to 1200W. These products feature 2xMOPP (Means of Patient Protection) isolation, low leakage current (<100μA), and meet stringent EMC requirements for medical equipment. Mean Well's medical power supplies are used in patient monitors, diagnostic equipment, laboratory instruments, and home healthcare devices worldwide. The ISO 13485 certified manufacturing ensures consistent quality for life-critical applications. As an authorized distributor, we can provide the complete medical certification package including CB reports, EMC test reports, and risk analysis documentation required for your medical device registration.
faqs.decisionGuide: Identify your medical device classification and isolation requirements. Contact us for medical certification documentation and application-specific recommendations.

faqs.question: What warranty coverage is provided for Mean Well products?
faqs.answer: Mean Well provides industry-leading warranty coverage for their power supplies. Standard products typically carry a 3-year warranty, while premium industrial and medical series often include 5-year warranty coverage. The warranty covers manufacturing defects and premature failure under normal operating conditions as specified in the product datasheet. Mean Well's warranty service includes repair or replacement at their discretion, with most warranty claims processed within 2-4 weeks. The warranty period begins from the date of manufacture, and products must be operated within specified parameters. Damage from misuse, overvoltage, or environmental conditions outside specifications is not covered. As an authorized distributor, we facilitate warranty claims and can provide advance replacement for critical applications. Extended warranty options may be available for high-volume customers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Review warranty terms for your specific product series. Contact our customer service team to initiate warranty claims or inquire about extended coverage.

faqs.question: Can Mean Well power supplies be used in harsh environments?
faqs.answer: Mean Well offers several product series specifically designed for harsh environment applications. Their HEP, HVG, and HVGC series feature IP67 protection for outdoor and washdown environments. For high-temperature applications, many models operate reliably up to 70°C ambient without derating. Mean Well also provides conformal coating options for humid or corrosive atmospheres, and vibration-resistant designs for transportation applications. Their railway-certified RSP and RSD series meet EN 50155 standards for rolling stock applications. For marine environments, selected models carry DNV/GL certifications. When selecting power supplies for harsh environments, consider temperature range, humidity, vibration, and required protection rating. Our FAE team can recommend specific models and any necessary derating for your environmental conditions.
faqs.decisionGuide: Define your environmental requirements including temperature range, humidity, and IP rating. Contact our FAE team for harsh environment product recommendations.
